steps.title: Substitute $x=2$
steps.content: Evaluate the function at the input the problem gives: $$h(2)=\frac{8}{5(2)+6}.$$

steps.title: Confirm the entry
steps.content: The answer can be entered as $\frac{1}{2}$ or .5. The stored answer uses .5. The numerator and denominator reduce by dividing both by $8$.
